clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Guide perioperative blood pressure medication management for surgical patients
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Preoperative assessment, surgical planning, medication reconciliation before elective major surgery
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Medication continuation/discontinuation decisions + surgical timing recommendations

navigationPath.purpose: Apply ACC/AHA guidelines to patient data

validationRules: Medication status must be documented for BB, ACEi, ARB, clonidine

rules: If patient on chronic BBs AND scheduled for major surgery → continue BBs throughout perioperative period
If patient on hypertension medications AND scheduled for elective major surgery → continue most medications (reasonable)
If patient on ACEi or ARB AND scheduled for major surgery → may consider discontinuation preoperatively to prevent hypotension
If SBP ≥180 OR DBP ≥110 AND scheduled for elective major surgery → may consider deferring surgery, especially in high-risk patients
If patient on BB or clonidine AND scheduled for surgery → abrupt preoperative discontinuation potentially harmful
If patient is BB-naïve AND scheduled for surgery → do not start BB on day of surgery

categories.name: Consider ACEi/ARB Discontinuation
categories.action: May discontinue preoperatively to prevent hypotension

categories.name: Consider Deferring Surgery
categories.condition: SBP ≥180 OR DBP ≥110 + elective major surgery

categories.name: No BB Initiation Day of Surgery
categories.action: Should not start on day of surgery

recommendedAction.description: Specific medication or surgical timing action

specialConsiderations.condition: if high-risk patient or specific medication

escalationLogic.ifAnySymptomPresent: Consider deferring elective major surgery to minimize perioperative complications
escalationLogic.ifNoSymptoms: May still consider deferral based on BP alone

appDisplay.button: Review surgical timing with care team
appDisplay.behavior: Flag for anesthesia consult before proceeding

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Consult anesthesia and surgical teams for medication management plan
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Reassess BP day of surgery if deferral considered
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm BP measurement before deferral decision
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag Class 3: Harm recommendations as critical safety alerts - prevent abrupt BB/clonidine discontinuation or day-of-surgery BB initiation
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log medication reconciliation and perioperative recommendations to surgical record
